title: verbascum birjandense
intro: Verbascum birjandense, a species of flowering plant in the figwort family, is native to Iran and is known for its medicinal properties. This plant is used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Verbascum birjandense include reducing coughs and colds, treating bronchitis, and alleviating symptoms of asthma. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tincture, tea, or powder to be used in herbal remedies, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
